title: Alpina Premium Glass Decanter - Wine Carafe 1.78 L in Swinging Design | 20 x 24 cm with Bevelled Pourer | for Optimal Ventilation of Red Wine
features: LARGE WINE DECANTER - This decanter has a capacity of 1780 ml, making it ideal for serving a full bottle of wine at dinners, parties, and other special occasions with ease and style.
IMPROVES WINE AERATION - Enhances wine flavors by allowing optimal airflow, making the aromas more vibrant and the taste of both red and white wines richer and smoother.
WINE ACCESSORY MADE OF GLASS - Designed from durable glass, this elegant and functional decanter is perfect for daily use and serves as a stylish centerpiece for your table.
EASY TO CLEAN DECANTER - This wine decanter is made of glass that is easy to rinse with warm water, making it hassle-free to maintain and suitable for everyday use.
ELEGANT AND ROBUST DESIGN - With its timeless design and strong glass construction, this decanter complements any table setting and withstands frequent use.
